metadata.description: Claude Code plugins by Eric Anderson

plugins.name: cleanroom
plugins.description: Launch isolated background agents for unbiased analysis without conversation context contamination

plugins.name: git
plugins.description: Detects GitHub vs Forgejo from the repo origin and steers Claude to the right CLI (gh vs fj). Bundles forgejo-issue and forgejo-pr skills plus a PreToolUse hook that blocks wrong-CLI calls.
